# Properties of the Definite Integral

## Highlights {.unnumbered}

- highlight 1
- highlight 2

## Preparation

(Pre-class reading and exercises)

## Body

:::{.theorem #thm-domain-additivity}
Suppose $a<b<c$ and that $f$ is Riemann integrable over $[a,c]$. Then
$$
\int_a^b f+\int_b^c f = \int_a^c f.
$$
:::

:::{.callout-tip collapse="true"}

#### Hint

A collapsed hint.
:::

## More sections

More content

## Review Questions {.unnumbered}

1. Question 1
2. Question 2
